title: P-128R2 The Tax Treatment of a Supply of an Undivided Working Interest in the Assets of a Mine or an Oil or Gas Well (Revised) - Canada.ca

## P-128R2 The Tax Treatment of a Supply of an Undivided Working Interest in the Assets of a Mine or an Oil or Gas Well (Revised)

## Notice to the reader
The GST/HST rates referenced in this publication are those that were in effect at the time of publishing. For the list of all applicable GST/HST rates (current and historic), go to GST/HST calculator (and rates) .
